lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Hello young [man/lady/one]! Come to visit old Grandpa Jack? I can tell ye stories for sure. I used to be the best fisherman these parts have seen!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me a story then.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Well, when I were a young man we used to take fishing trips over to Catherby; The fishing over there - now that was something!

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Anyway, we decided to do a bit of fishing with our nets, I wasn't having the best of days turning up nothing but old boots and bits of seaweed. Then my net suddenly got really heavy!

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: I pulled it up...

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: To my amazement I'd caught this little chest thing!

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Even more amazing was when I opened it it contained a diamond the size of a radish! That's the best catch I've ever had!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have time now.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Sigh...

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Young people - always in such a rush.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy one of your fishing rods?

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Of course you can young man. Let's see now...I think 5 gold is a fair price for a rod which has won the Fishing contest before eh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough money for that, I'll go get some and come back.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Right you are. I'll be here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very fair, I'll buy that rod!

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Excellent choice!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Only problem is, I don't have any space to carry one right now. Let me get back to you on that.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Right you are. I'll be here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: You're welcome young 'un.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's too rich for me, I'll go to Catherby.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: If you're sure.... passing up an opportunity of a lifetime you are.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've forgotten how to fish, can you remind me?

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Of course! Let me see now...You'll need a rod and bait. You can fish with a net too, but not in the competition.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok... I think I can get those at Catherby.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Then simply find yourself a fishing spot, either in the competition near here, or wherever you can - I recommend net fishing in Catherby. Net or Lure the fish in the fishing spot by clicking on it and then be

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: patient...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's that simple?

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Yep! Go get em tiger.
